example: Lately I felt so out of shape, so I wanted to change my lifestyle.
zh: 體態不佳，身體狀況不好
ja: 体調が悪い、体の調子が良くない

example: I wanted to lose weight too.
If I hadn't gained so much weight, I would have been more energetic.
If you have any advice for me, I'll be happy to listen.
If you didn't eat so many sweets anymore, you would definitely lose weight.
You should also try to avoid junk food.
zh: 垃圾食物，不健康的食物

example: You'll not get enough vitamins if you don't eat fresh fruit.
If I drank packaged juice instead of eating fruits and vegetables, would that be enough?
If you want to be in good shape, exercise at least two times a week.
If I could work out twice a week, that would be awesome.
You need to get enough rest if you want to stay healthy.
If you didn't drink cola in the evening anymore, you would be sleepy.
He said that if I became an actress, he would be very disappointed.
If I had had any acting skills, I would have considered becoming an actress too.
I would like to become an air hostess.
I would have such a thrilling life.
If you eat too many sweets, you gain weight.
zh: 零條件句（表示普遍真理）
ja: ゼロ条件文（普遍的な真実を表す）

example: You will not get enough vitamins if you don't eat fresh fruits.
zh: 第一條件句（表示可能發生的未來事件）
ja: 第一条件文（起こりうる未来のことを表す）

example: If you didn't eat so many sweets anymore, you would lose weight.
zh: 第二條件句（表示與現在事實相反的假設）
ja: 第二条件文（現在の事実に反する仮定を表す）

example: I would have been on time if the traffic hadn't been so bad.
zh: 第三條件句（表示與過去事實相反的假設）
ja: 第三条件文（過去の事実に反する仮定を表す）
